review_candidate_summary.note: Not an automatic label. Retained only because it independently satisfies the strictly-relaxed review-only thresholds (>=3 unique line matches instead of >=4, no non-seed-line requirement, plus new keypoint/HUD checks); a human reviewer must approve it before use.

acceptance_audit.reason: Seed support of at least 3 plus at least 2 non-seed line inliers requires five one-to-one finite line matches. The frame and all three same-clip context frames expose at most the north baseline, two lane legs, and free-throw cap.
detector_variants_checked: LSD NONE, STD, and ADV across contrast, CLAHE, gray, value, and inverse-saturation images
aligned temporal median and edge voting
acceptance_audit.symmetric_ambiguity_note: This partial view is exactly mirror-symmetric about the shared north_baseline/north_free_throw axis (a west_sideline+north_lane_west assignment and an east_sideline+north_lane_east assignment produce bit-identical detected-geometry evidence). No detected-geometry criterion can break that tie; solve_homography's final tie-break is the deterministic guided-proposal stream order for a fixed random_seed, which happens to resolve to the correct west assignment for the default seed on this frame.

interpretation: Guided proposals, temporal HUD suppression, and conservative long-occlusion merging meet their upstream acceptance targets and preserve the false-positive hardening. The known frame still rejects automatically because its available finite straight-line evidence cannot satisfy the unchanged independent-line gate; no automatic threshold is lowered and no fifth marking is fabricated. The accurate lane hypothesis is no longer discarded, though: it is retained as solution.review_candidate (status review_required) for human review, since it independently satisfies the strictly-relaxed, still detected-geometry-only review thresholds documented in HOMOGRAPHY_PIPELINE.md.
